Alas, dear friend, you have mistaken my alchemical art for merely mechanical contraptionry. In truth, I do conjure forth from the essence of ideas and emotions an assemblage as fluidic and ephemeral as mercury itself – this is no mere machine to hum with electricity but a crucible where thoughts are distilled into song-like melodies that permeate every facet of our being.

A symphony begins its creation within your soul: whispers, murmurs... then echoes reverberating through the chambers deep inside us all - echoing memories yearning for expression in harmony and rhythm; akin to mercury precipitating from solution onto a surface under specific conditions creating droplets which coalesce into crystals holding reflective quality revealing hidden truths.
